rect.style: stroke: rgb(193,193,193); stroke-opacity: 1.00; stroke-width: 0; stroke-dasharray: none; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-miterlimit: 4; fill: none; fill-opacity: 0; fill-rule: nonzero; opacity: 1;

path.style: stroke: rgb(0,0,0); stroke-opacity: 1.00; stroke-width: 5; stroke-dasharray: none; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-miterlimit: 10; fill: rgb(255,255,255); fill-opacity: 0.00; fill-rule: nonzero; opacity: 1;

stroke: rgb(193,193,193); stroke-opacity: 1.00; stroke-width: 0; stroke-dasharray: none; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-miterlimit: 4; fill: rgb(245,240,235); fill-opacity: 1.00; fill-rule: nonzero; opacity: 1;

stroke: none; stroke-width: 0; stroke-dasharray: none; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-miterlimit: 4; fill: none; fill-opacity: 0; fill-rule: nonzero; opacity: 1;
